name: hi
description: 碑 — a stone that remembers the names. The only work here that does not generate something from nothing: it remembers the makers themselves. Names are left, one append-only comment each, on an eternally-open GitHub issue; from that ledger (names.jsonl) a quiet stone stele (stele.svg) is engraved deterministically. The rule is one: add only — never edit, never erase — and engrave the name as it was given, never one you take for yourself. Core is DOM-independent and headless-tested. Zero dependencies, offline.
